arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle Carabao Cup - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: With Sky an d ITV both broadcasting the fixture, there are several ways that fans can live-stream Arsenal vs Newcastle in the Carabao Cup. Here, football.london takes a look at the ways fans can watch Arsenal vs Newcastle in the Carabao Cup on TV.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher highlights where Arsenal must improve to reignite title challenge
arts.sum: Carragher believes there is still hope that Mikel Arteta’s side can challenge Liverpool

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri Injury: Progress and Potential Return Date for Arsenal Academy Product
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is the latest Arsenal attacker to suffer an injury as Mikel Arteta faces a crisis up front.

arts.ttl: I stood up and said sorry to everyone after Mikel Arteta brought me to tears at Arsenal
arts.sum: Despite carving out a name as one of his era's most lethal strikers, it was evident that even Aubameyang wasn't immune to team policies under Arteta. "When we got to the hotel, he called me to his room and said I wasn't going to play," Aubameyang told The Athletic .

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's call to recall winger - and what it means with Saka out
arts.sum: Shrewsbury Town took to their social channels to confirm the news regarding his loan termination earlier this week, writing: "Shrewsbury Town can confirm Charles Sagoe Jr has returned to parent club Arsenal. Charles Sagoe Jr returning to the Emirates Stadium from his loan stint at Shrewsbury Town could stir up some excitement for Arsenal fans.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports make major decision for Arsenal vs Newcastle Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Arsenal fans will have an easy way to watch the Carabao Cup semi-final against Newcastle thanks to a decision by Sky Sports. As well as the first leg between Arsenal and Newcastle, ITV will also be broadcasting the second leg of the other semi-final between Tottenham and Liverpool next month.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri injury: Could Kai Havertz replace "devastated" Arsenal attacker on right wing?
arts.sum: Arsenal attacker Ethan Nwaneri will be "absolutely devastated" by his injury but should use the experience as a "learning curve", according to expert Charles Watts.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Newcastle Carabao Cup semi-final for free after EFL decision
arts.sum: The Magpies will travel to North London to take on the Gunners in the first leg of their semi-final of the EFL Cup. Newcastle beat Brentford in their quarter-final tie back in December, and will face an Arsenal team that defeated Crystal Palace in the last round. Eddie Howe's side are away for the first leg, which will be free to air, but the second leg at home to the Gunners will be shown exclusively on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Kevin Keegan breaks silence on Newcastle United return and commits to fans reunion
arts.sum: Keegan has yet to commit to any plans but wanted to make his first visit of 2025 a worthwhile affair by raising funds for NSPCC and the Tiny Lives Trust charities. Event organiser Terry Sweeney, a former manager and committee member of the legendary Wallsend Boys Club, said, "Newcastle is a city with football running through its veins, and there’s no one who embodies that passion more than Kevin Keegan.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly decision made as £32m man drops out: Arsenal predicted starting XI v Newcastle
arts.sum: Arsenal host Newcastle United in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final on Tuesday night. The Gunners will hope to gain a sizeable advantage...
